meaning: n.左翼的人,左派,左撇子adj.左翼的,左撇子
examples: I had no idea that Bob used to be such a leftist.
Theidea that history is moving onwards and upwards to a state of perfection is nota leftist one.
The works created when DING stayed in the League of Leftist Writers and Yenan illustrate that she tried to voice on behalf of women in the limited discourse space.
The leftist party has supported bailouts from international lenders while seeking to renegotiate the terms.
Few Mexicans are indifferent to the man who's vying to be Mexico's first leftist president.
